maternity_coverage.source_quote: 1. Maternity Expenses – We will indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred up to the amount speciĤed against this BeneĤt in the Policy Schedule for the Maternity Expenses.

newborn_coverage.source_quote: 2. New-Born Baby Cover – We will indemnify up to the amount speciĤed against this BeneĤt in the Policy Schedule for the Medical Expenses incurred in respect of a New Born Baby.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 5. Organ Donor – We will indemnity Medical Expenses up to the Sum Insured as speciĤed in the Policy Schedule, towards organ donor’s Hospitalization for harvesting of the donated organ.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: 10. Unlimited Restore Beneﬁt – We shall restore the Base Sum Insured unlimited times during the Policy Year after occurrence and payment of claim amount under the Policy.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: 8. Domiciliary Hospitalization – We will Reimburse the Medical Expenses incurred for the Insured Person’s Domiciliary Hospitalization during the Policy Period following an Illness or Injury.

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote: 5. Global Cover – We will indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred towards the Insured Person’s Inpatient Care outside India caused solely and directly due to any of the listed Illness/Procedures.
